name: pdfstudio
description: Simple app to add watermark, numbering and merging pdf files

scripts.dev:hmr: bun scripts/sync-version.ts && concurrently "bun run hmr" "bun run start"
scripts.build:canary: vite build && electrobun build --env=canary && bun scripts/post-build.ts
scripts.build:stable: vite build && electrobun build --env=stable && bun scripts/post-build.ts
scripts.lint: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run scripts/validate-i18n.ts
